calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Order Expunging Improperly Recorded Memorandum Of Management Agreement.
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey D. Kirk, esq. (415-693-9960) of O'Connor and Associates for Plaintiff/Opposing party Agesong Living LLC, et al.
Malcolm Leader-Picone, esq. (510-444-2404 x.24) for Defendant/Moving party DONALD KUNG.
Court reporter: Marlene Puaoi CSR #7370 (510-444-4500).

Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court will allow Plaintiff to submit 1 Action Rule via email by 4pm 12/1/17 and defendant to respond by 12/4/17 noon. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DONALD KUNG's Motion For Order Expunging Improperly Recorded Memorandum Of Management Agreement is Taken Under Submission. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Marlene Puaoi CSR #7370 (510-444-4500). (D501)
